title: Application Form for the Selection Process for Master's/Doctorate - PPGI/UFAM

instructionList.fillFields: Fill in the fields email, password, repeat password, and select a notice to register a new candidate.
instructionList.repeatPassword: The Repeat Password field must be filled with the same value as the Password field.
instructionList.registrationEmail: The registration email cannot be repeated for the same notice. If you have already started your registration in a notice, access the option Continue Registration by clicking the Back button.
instructionList.confirmRegistration: After confirming the registration, you will be directed to the application form.

noEditals: No notices available at this time.

validation.emailInvalid: The field Email must be a valid email.
validation.passwordMinlength: The field Password must be at least 6 characters long.
validation.passwordStrong: The password must contain uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and numbers.
validation.repeatPasswordMinlength: The field Repeat Password must be at least 6 characters long.
validation.repeatPasswordEqual: The field Repeat Password must match the value in the Password field.

error.candidateExists1: Candidate already exists for this notice.
error.candidateExists2: Click here to continue your registration
error.candidateExists3: or register with another email and/or notice.
error.default: An error occurred. Please try again later.
